category_sources: source_facts.description: Terminal for Kubernetes; official kty docs describe SSH/TUI access to Kubernetes resources.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official docs title use kty.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the dedicated official documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/grampelberg/kty, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official docs describe kty as an SSH server with a TUI dashboard for Kubernetes; source_facts.executables lists kty.
